metaTitle: Academic Table Maker for Research Papers — Free | {{BRAND_NAME}}
metaDescription: Build publication-ready tables for academic papers. APA-compatible headers, table captions, column formatting, and export to LaTeX and PDF. Free, no signup.
heroSubtext: Format your data for journal submission, thesis chapters, and conference papers. Captions, column types, academic themes, and LaTeX export — all in one browser tab.

benefits.heading: Table captions and titles
benefits.body: Add a caption above your table with alignment options. Essential for APA and MLA style guides. Exports to LaTeX as caption{} and to Word as a styled caption row.

benefits.heading: Academic theme built in
benefits.body: The Academic theme applies a grey header, double top border, and clean body styling — matching common journal formatting guidelines. One click, consistent output.

benefits.heading: LaTeX export
benefits.body: Export to LaTeX tabular format with booktabs-compatible rules. Your table goes directly into your .tex document — no manual conversion or reformatting needed.

benefits.heading: Column types for research data
benefits.body: Set columns to Number, Currency, Percentage, or Date. Auto-sum numeric columns. Auto-number participant IDs or observation sequences.

steps.heading: Import or build your table
steps.body: Import from Excel or CSV, or build from scratch. Set your column types (Number, Text, Currency) to match your data.

steps.heading: Apply academic formatting
steps.body: Add a caption. Choose the Academic theme. Set header style to Both if your table has row headers. Adjust column widths for readability.

steps.heading: Export for publication
steps.body: Export to LaTeX for journal submission, PDF for review, or CSV for data sharing. The caption and column formatting are preserved in every format.

useCases: Building data tables for journal articles and conference papers
Creating appendix tables for thesis and dissertation submissions
Formatting survey results and statistical summaries for publication
Converting research spreadsheets into publication-ready tables
Exporting clean LaTeX tabular code for academic manuscripts
